verses.text: Topa in Moses kiangah
“Israel mite tungah hih bangin gen in: Note kong piak leitangah a teng dingin na tun' uh ciangin

bawnghon pan hita leh tuuhon pan hita leh thuciamna tun'sakna dingin Topa' tungah meihal biakna ahi a, biakpiakna ahi zongin na piak ciang uh hita leh, Topa' tungah a gim namtui bawlna dingin utthu-a biakna hita leh, a kiseh pawi hunte-ah biakpiakna hita leh na piak uh ciangin
biakna a paipih mipa in annel lawh khat sathau biing khat tawh a kibawl an tawh biakna Topa' tungah pia ding hi
Tuuno khat tawh piak khawm dingin meihal biakna ahih kei leh biakpiakna tawh, tuibuah dingin leenggahzu thawl khat na bawl ding uh hi
Tua ahih kei leh tuutal khat tawh piakkhawm dingin annel lawh nih sathau biing nih tawh a kibawl an tawh biakna ding na bawl ding uh hi
Topa' tungah a gim namtui-in tuibuah dingin leenggahzu thawl khat na pia ding uh hi
Meihal biakna ding ahi a, thuciamna tun'sakna-in biakpiakna ding ahi a, Topa' tungah thunuama biakna ding ahi zongin bawngtal na bawl uh ciangin
mi khat in a bawngtal tawh annel lawh thum sathau biing thum tawh a kibawl an tawh biakna pia ding a
Topa' tungah a gim namtui, mei tawh kihal biakna-in tuibuah dingin leenggahzu thawl nih na pia ding uh hi
“Bawngtal ahi a, tuutal ahi zongin, tuuno a pa ahi a, keelno a pa tawh ahi zongin piak khawm dingin tua bangin kihih ding hi
Na piak uh ganhing khempeuh a malzah tawh kizui-in tua bangin na bawlkim ding uh hi
Topa' tungah a gim namtui, mei tawh kihal biakna a piakna uhah tualsung mi khempeuh in hih nate tu-a bangin hih ding uh hi

Note kiangah khualmi khat hong peem ahi a, na khang tawntungun note lakah mi khatpeuh hong om ahi zongin, amah in Topa' tungah a gim namtui, mei tawh kihal biakna a piak nop leh, note' hih mah bangin hih ding hi
Mihonpi-a' dingin ngeina khat om ding a, note leh note' lakah hong peem mi-a' dingin tawntung ngeina khat na khang tawntungun om ding hi. Topa' mai-ah note leh peemta mite na kibang ding uh hi
Note leh note' lakah hong peem mi-a' dingin a kibang thukhat, ngeina kip khat om ding hi,” a ci hi
Topa in Moses kiangah
“Israel mite tungah hih bangin gen in: Note kong paipihna gamah tungin
tua gama piang ante na nek uh ciangin Topa' tungah biakna na pia ding uh hi
Na anlak uh a masa pen sung panin biakna-in moh khat na pia ding uh a, an cilna pana biakna-in na piak bangun na bawl ding uh hi
Na khang tawntungun na anlak uh a masa pen Topa' tungah biakna-in na pia ding uh hi
“Ahih hangin note khialin, Topa in Moses tungah a gensa hih thupiaknate khempeuh
Topa in a thupiak-a kipanin na khang tawntungun, Moses tung tawnin Topa in note hong thupiakte khempeuh na zuih kei uh leh

theihlohna hangin mihonte' phawklohin a kikhial ahih leh, mihonte khempeuh in Topa' tungah a gim namtui, meihal biakna dingin bawngtalno khat, ngeina kip om bangin an tawh biakna leh a tuibuah tawh, leh khialhna hanga biakna-in keel a pa khat pia ding hi

Siampipa in Israel mihonte khempeuh-a' dingin kilemna bawlsak ding a, amaute kimaisak ding hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh tua pen tatkhialhna hi a, amaute in tua amau' tatkhialhna hangin Topa' tungah mei tawh kihal amau' biakna leh khialhna hanga amau' biakna uh Topa' mai-ah paipih khin uh hi
Tua tatkhialhna in amaute khempeuh huamkha ahih manin Israel mihonte khempeuh leh amau' lakah a peem khualmi zong kimaisak ding hi
“Theihlohna hangin mi khat a khialh leh, khialhna hanga biakna dingin kum khat a pha keelnu khat pia ding hi
Mi khat, theihlohna hangin a khialh ciangin, amah a sian'kik theihna dingin siampipa in tua a khial mipa-a' dingin Topa' mai-ah kilemna bawlsak ding a, amah kimaisak ding hi
Theihlohna hangin na khat peuhpeuh a hih kha, Israel mite' lakah a om tualsung mipa leh amaute' lakah a peem khualmipa-a' dingin ngeina a kibang khat na nei ding uh hi
“Ahih hangin tualsung mi hita leh peemta hita leh, na khat peuhpeuh a hih teitei mipa in Topa a simmawh hi a, tua mipa kithat ding hi
Amah in Topa' thu simmawhin, a thupiakna siasak ahih manin, tua mipa kithat ding a, ama mawhna amah in thuak ding hi,” a ci hi.

sections.sectionTitle: Sabbath a Palsat mi a Kiden'na

verses.text: Israel mite gamlakah a om sungun, Sabbath ni-in sing a tom mi khat mu uh hi
Sing a tom laitak a mu mite in Aaron leh Moses, leh mihonte khempeuh kiangah amah paipih uh hi
Amah bang kicih ding ci-in teltakin kigenlo ahih manin amaute in khumcip uh hi
Topa in Moses kiangah, “Tua mipa kithat ding hi. Mihonte khempeuh in giahphual pua-ah suang tawh amah deng ding uh hi,” a ci hi
Mihonte khempeuh in giahphual pua-ah amah paipih uh a, Topa in Moses a thupiak bangin suang tawh amah a denglum uh hi.
Topa in Moses kiangah
“Israel mite tungah gen in la, a khang tawntungun a puan mongte uhah a teep bawlin, a puan mongteep tungah khau dum khat a khih dingun sawl in

Tua pen, note in utluatna tawh na zuih theihzel uh ahi nomau' lungsim leh nomau' mittang' deihna zuikha loin, note in na et ding uh puanmongteep leh Topa' thupiakte khempeuh phawkin na sepna ding uh ahi hi
Tua ahih ciangin note in ka thupiakte khempeuh phawkin na sem ding uh a, na Pasian uh tungah na siangtho ding uh hi
Kei pen, note' Pasian ahi dingin Egypt panin note a hong paikhiatpih Topa na Pasian uh ka hi hi; kei pen Topa na Pasian uh ka hi hi,” a ci hi.
